checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 123 correctly expands the apply-mode pilot following the pattern from issue 119. pr_open uses the same evidence gate check, ErrorActionPreference guard, and github_mutation_result recording pattern.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge.ps1 calls gh pr create for pr_open with all gates. Scope guard updated to issue_close and pr_open. apply-unsupported-op test updated to use merge operation. Documentation updated with pr_open section. All artifacts created.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: pr_open is bounded by 7 evidence gates and explicit confirmation flags. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files limited to declared scope paths. The gh pr create call uses the same ErrorActionPreference guard pattern as issue_close. No credentials stored.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: apply-unsupported-op test updated to use merge and check for apply-pilot-supports-issue_close-and-pr_open boundary. All CLI tests pass (0 failures).

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 123 PR and remains an external merge gate. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI. Notes that live pr_open execution is pending post-merge closure with github_ci_passed: true evidence.

findings.evidence: PR, CI, and merge for issue 123 are pending external GitHub gates.
findings.recommendation: Open the PR, wait for required checks, and merge only if policy gates pass. Then create issue 125 (post-merge closure + live pr_open execution).

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 123 branch.
apply-mode pr_open live execution pending post-merge closure.
